description_long: This is a circular, multi-seat sofa with a striking red upholstery and a central cylindrical white table or pedestal. The sofa is divided into four distinct seating sections, each with its own backrest and armrest partitions, creating a semi-enclosed, booth-like arrangement. The seat cushions are plush and contoured, with visible creases and folds that suggest a soft, padded surface. The backrests are rounded and rise to a medium height, providing support and a sense of separation between each seat. The armrests are integrated into the partition walls between seats, matching the height of the backrests and contributing to the enclosed feel. The base of the sofa is low to the ground, and no legs are visible, giving it a grounded, modern appearance.
description: A circular, red multi-seat sofa with four semi-enclosed sections and a central white pedestal. Each seat features plush cushions, rounded backrests, and integrated armrests for a booth-like, modern look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two main seating sections with plush red cushions and a central white pedestal, highlighting the semi-enclosed design.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing the partitioned seating arrangement and the curvature of the backrests, with the white pedestal visible at the center.
description_view_2: Direct view of a single seat section, emphasizing the rounded backrest, deep seat cushion, and the smooth transition to the central pedestal.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back of two seat sections, the continuous red upholstery, and the low, grounded base.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four individual seat and back cushions, each attached and uniformly sized, arranged in a circular, sectional layout with integrated partitions.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present as thick, padded partitions between each seat, matching the height of the backrests and forming semi-enclosed booths with a straight, blocky profile.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base appears continuous and fully upholstered, giving a grounded, platform-like appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, rounded backrests for each seat section, continuous with the armrest partitions, and featuring a smooth, padded surface.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid red upholstery with a smooth, slightly creased texture, no visible decorative stitching or patterned detailing.
